reviews.review_description:
From a complete begginer perspective first it was very hard to be able to put the piano over the small organ I bought to learn. The apk gives you around 45 seconds to place the piano and it is too short a time. Then you have classical music to practice. There are 3 velocities, 1, 075 and 050. So for me it was, almost imposible to get to the right notes. Even in 050, for a begginer is too fast. You need aat least 025 and some kind of animation where you see the note coming, not just appearing from nowhere. Also I pressed many times the setting button and nothing happened. Nor was any Ai character waiting at the end of the song to tell me anything.
I think it has great potencial, I hope I didn't throw 20$ and will not be able tu use the apk to learn piano, as advertised. I hope the developer will see this message. I'm willing to be the guinea pig in this, as, again, I'm just starting to learn. (62 y. o)
